name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- Added UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence Action=MemberUsages for read-only serialized Unity member usage scans before renaming or removing callback methods and inspector fields.
- MemberUsages finds UnityEvent persistent method bindings, AnimationEvent function names, and serialized field entries on target script components.
- Results include asset path, line/column, property path, YAML document info, object path, indexed object path, component/script type, usage kind, confidence, note, and preview text.
- Added aliases such as member_usages, serialized_member_usages, serialized_member_search, unity_event_usages, animation_event_usages, and serialized_field_usages across BatchActions, Discover, ToolGuide, and DomainCatalog.

### Improved

- UniBridge_BatchActions now normalizes ScriptIntelligence MemberUsages action aliases plus member/method/field/function parameter aliases.
- Script reference workflows now cover both script GUID references and serialized Unity member references.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence and UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence provide bounded YAML reference locations for asset/script GUID usages.
- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence Action=Structure provides read-only prefab and already-loaded scene asset structure workflows.
- UniBridge_TypeSchema TypeIndex and TypeFingerprint provide compact loaded Unity type maps and cache fingerprints.
- UniBridge_BatchActions can append opt-in post-action console and editor-event diagnostics.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
